text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I bump into Bamboo Memory
while we're out one day.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah, Bamboo. Enjoying a day out?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm heading to the museum! Apparently,
they're holding some kind of special exhibition of
super-rare stuff, so my mom said I should go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What was it again... I think she said they were
displaying diaries from different time periods...
Or maybe it was essays?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Perhaps the exhibition includes writings
from legendary martial artists. I'm quite intrigued!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing this, we decide to accompany
Bamboo Memory to the museum.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Man, that exhibit was pretty impressive! All that
handwriting was so squiggly though. I couldn't
really read what anything said.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I keep thinking about one of the diaries I saw.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeaaah, you mean that one you were checking
out super close? What was it the plaque said
again?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Martial arts have become meaningless." The
author recorded their feeling for years and
concluded that endless years of battle have
resulted in a nothingness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am familiar with these notions. I am also familiar
with someone else who feels this way.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She's an Umamusume who trained above me in
the martial arts. She was among the very finest—a
martial arts virtuoso who attained complete
mastery at a young age.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She was mighty and kind, but what really stood
out was her determination to master the martial
arts. Many deeply admired her, myself included.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But things began to change when she entered the
Warriors of Heaven and Earth Tournament.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I gave that final match all I had to offer. I utilized
all the Yaegaki techniques I'd acquired against an
opponent who had bested the finest warriors.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
It was a thrill like no other to face off against the
strongest opponent while at the peak of my
abilities, and in a climactic match, at that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
It shouldn't come as a surprise, then, that I've felt
empty since then. It's like my life no longer has
a... destination.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
After that, she abandoned the Kongo Yaegaki
style. Even now, I have no idea of her
whereabouts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The path of self-refinement ought to stretch out
indefinitely. And yet, if I were to glimpse its end
the way she did...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wonder what I would do.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Yaeno, can I borrow you for a sec?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've changed clothes as you've instructed, but...
what are we doing exactly?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?! We're going for a run!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just see if you can overtake me! This is a
no-holds-barred, full-throttle contest!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo?! Ngh, wait!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? Is that all you got?! Don't blame
me if you take it easy and get whooped!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! What was that?! Watch and witness the
power of the Yaegaki style!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno & Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... It seems you've grown even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Do you get it now?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Even if you feel like you've reached the end of
the path, your friendly foes will always be there
to overtake you again! We're not gonna give you
any time to feel empty inside!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So you've gotta grow eeeven stronger, just like we're gonna get even stronger too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Basically, everything's gonna be totally fine!
There's nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm truly blessed to be surrounded by such
people.
choice_data_list:
I guess there's nothing to fear if you're running
alongside everyone else.

I guess there's nothing to fear if you're running
alongside everyone else.

Maybe this will help you get your Yaegaki
friend back on track.

Maybe this will help you get your Yaegaki
friend back on track.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm truly blessed to be surrounded by such
people.
choice_data_list:
I guess there's nothing to fear if you're running
alongside everyone else.

I guess there's nothing to fear if you're running
alongside everyone else.

Maybe this will help you get your Yaegaki
friend back on track.

Maybe this will help you get your Yaegaki
friend back on track.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Friendly foes... Indeed. What a terrific way of
putting it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have to wonder now—what might have
happened if my fellow pupil had known this
feeling?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki gazes up at the sky, as if a weight's
been lifted from her shoulders. And yet, her
expression is not without a subtle sadness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed... If only I could become her "friendly foe."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, I will become that challenge for her! Not only in terms of strength, but also by attaining a state of mind that allows me to empathize with her struggles!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And in preparation for that day... I shall continue
to devote myself to progress!
